ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., class, interface) */,
  "protocol" INTEGER /* Protocol level for the component */,
  "ref_id" TEXT /* Reference ID for component relationships */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "implementation_file_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the files table, linking the component to its implementation file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the repository */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in megabytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure integrity */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file (e.g., text/java, text/csv) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this line belongs to */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the source file */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Column number in the source file */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the files table, linking the line to its file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_lines_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_lines_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0.0) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the version release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table, linking the version to the user who created it */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that has the dependency */,
  "depends_on_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that is depended upon */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., required, optional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_depends_on_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("depends_on_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the documentation entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table, linking the documentation to the user who created it */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table, linking the documentation to the user who last updated it */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the component */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table, linking the change log to the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_components" (
  "project_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-component link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being used in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-component link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-component link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship entry */,
  "parent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent component */,
  "child_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_relationships_parent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_relationships_child_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component related to the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table, linking the error to the user who encountered it */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the error occurred (e.g., development, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
